economic_notes: Old Massett Economic Development Corporation, Old Massett Economic Development Limited Partnership, and 1199196 B.C. Ltd. consolidated. 50% investment in Haida Gwaii Forest Products Joint Venture (wood processing/sales) accounted for by modified equity method. COVID-19 caused delays in capital and maintenance operations projects. Post year-end acquisition of excavator for $275,000 (less $50,000 trade-in) and three properties for $150,000 for low-income and nurse housing.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify whether budgeted information was approved by Chief and Council or community members. Large deferred revenue balance of $12,218,561 (up from $2,426,618 prior year) driven by $10,691,264 in contributions received under 'Other' category — significant increase warrants attention. Three entities fully consolidated; one joint venture (Haida Gwaii Forest Products) on modified equity basis reporting a net loss of $40,825. Funds held in trust ($473,571) with offsetting accumulated surplus entry. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $11,678,753 + FNHA $9,293 + Province of BC $1,298,913 + Government of Canada $170,436 + CMHC $363,531 = $13,520,926; osr = $18,081,749 - $13,520,926 = $4,560,823. Water treatment plant TCA ($4,990,329 cost, net ~$1,247,588) excluded from Schedule 1 subtotal shown; full net TCA including water treatment plant and assets under construction = approximately $19,815,000 per schedule but statement of financial position figure used.
